android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bg_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:strokeColor="@color/border_subtle" app:strokeWidth="1dp"> >>>>>>> final
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical"> ======= android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp"> >>>>>>> final
<ImageView android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:src="@drawable/ic_assignment" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:contentDescription="@string/assignment" app:tint="@color/brand_primary"/> ======= android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:contentDescription="@string/assignment" android:src="@drawable/ic_assignment" app:tint="@color/brand_primary" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" tools:text="Assignment Title"/> ======= android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" tools:text="Assignment Title" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_due_date" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" tools:text="Mar 1, 2025"/> ======= android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:textSize="12sp" tools:text="Mar 1, 2025" /> >>>>>>> final
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_days_left" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" <<<<<<< HEAD tools:text="3 days"/> ======= tools:text="3 days" /> >>>>>>> final
